current_version.summary: Module registry, settings redesign, update mechanism, welcome wizard, app icon, installer fixes

completed_tasks.title: Update mechanism — GitHub releases API polling, UpdateWindowController, skip-version, Check for Updates in menu + settings
First-run welcome wizard — module selection on fresh install
Single-instance guard — exit immediately if already running
App icon — AppIcon.icns from source artwork, wired into Info.plist and package.sh
Fix menu bar bolt icon — two palette colours (white bolt + status-coloured circle)
Fix .pkg installer — /Applications path, bootout before bootstrap, clean up app bundle after package build to prevent macOS relocation bug

deferred_to_next_version: Code signing + notarization (pending Apple Developer account)
